articles.title: England held to goalless draw by Ghana
articles.summary: England fail to repeat their performance that overpowered Croatia in their first World Cup game as they are held to a draw by a resolute Ghana at Boston Stadium.

articles.title: 'Anxious moment for England' - should this have been Ghana penalty?
articles.summary: England's Ezri Konsa makes a last-ditch attempt to stop Ghana's Prince Adu during their World Cup Group L match in Boston.

articles.title: Tuchel credits 'committed' Ghana defending after England draw
articles.summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel says England found it "difficult" to break down Ghana's defence, after the two teams played out a 0-0 draw at the 2026 World Cup.

articles.title: Spence appears not to shake hands with Partey
articles.summary: Footage circulating on social media appears to show England's Djed Spence not shaking hands with Ghana's Thomas Partey before their World Cup group match in Boston.

articles.title: Mendes scores 'brilliant' second goal for Portugal
articles.summary: Nuno Mendes and Cristiano Ronaldo trick the entire stadium to score a second goal for Portugal against Uzbekistan in their Group K match in the 2026 World Cup.

articles.summary: England midfielder Declan Rice says he remains positive despite being held to a 0-0 draw against Ghana in their World Cup Group L match in Boston.

articles.title: Norway win five-goal thriller against Senegal to make last 32
articles.summary: Erling Haaland scores twice as Norway book their place in the last 32 of the World Cup with a 3-2 victory over Senegal in New Jersey.

articles.title: France weather storm to beat Iraq and sail into knockouts
articles.summary: Kylian Mbappe marks his 100th international cap for France with two goals in a 3-0 win over Iraq which seals' Les Bleus place in the last 32, after a two-hour storm delay.

articles.title: Deschamps returns to France after death of his mother
articles.summary: France head coach Didier Deschamps will miss his side's final World Cup group game following the death of his mother, the French Football Federation confirms.

articles.title: Iran's US entry terms changed for final group game
articles.summary: Iran's football team is being given extra time in the United States to prepare for their final World Cup group game, the US Department of Homeland Security says.

articles.title: Commentator stripped of Fifa credentials over Almiron rant
articles.summary: Fifa strip a commentator of his World Cup credentials after an on-air, expletive-laden ​rant against the organisation and match officials during Paraguay's victory over Turkey.
